qa_pairs.question: My sponsored role is still deactivated even though I completed my account renewal on CCDB. How can I reactivate it?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsored role remains deactivated after you've completed your account renewal on CCDB, it is because your sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their own account.

qa_pairs.question: What is the reason for a sponsored role remaining deactivated after an individual has renewed their account?
qa_pairs.answer: A sponsored role remains deactivated after an individual has renewed their account because the sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their account.
